name: opensearch
description: Privacy-oriented search infrastructure for LLM assistants

scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @opensearch/contracts build && pnpm --filter @opensearch/prompts build && pnpm --filter @opensearch/sources build && pnpm --filter @opensearch/core build && pnpm --filter @opensearch/sdk build && pnpm --filter @opensearch/testkit build
scripts.build: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm run build:apps
scripts.ci: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm run build
